description: Historical log of generated, selected, and rejected architecture outcomes

outcomes.name: MLM Level Dynamic Promotion Resolution
generatedOutcomes: Change level threshold to newLevel > minRankLevel
Add a manual toggle to disable role updates per user
outcomes.selectedOutcome: Change level threshold to newLevel > minRankLevel dynamically based on configured ranks (prevents base role signup leadership assignments automatically).

rejectedOutcomes.reason: Adding manual toggles per user creates administrative overhead and does not fix the root automated promotion issue.

outcomes.name: Plan Leadership Eligibility Outcome
generatedOutcomes: Separate leadership plans into a different database table completely
outcomes.selectedOutcome: Add isLeadershipEligible boolean field to Plan schema and filter out non-eligible plan deposits in checkMlmRankUpgrade and exit early in updateBinaryTreeVolumes.

rejectedOutcomes.reason: Creating a separate table complicates the schema, breaks existing plan UI cards, and duplicates plan management logic.
